title: String Clone
description: Understand heap memory by cloning a String to allow two owners of the same data.
problemStatement:
Deep copying! Create a `String` from `"Hello"`. Clone it into a second variable and print both.

**Requirement:** Use the `.clone()` method explicitly.
hints: In Rust, simple assignment of a heap-allocated variable (like String) moves its ownership. Cloning makes a copy on the heap.
